source.description: How the saved raster master was obtained.
source.notes: Any rejected previews, drafts, or source constraints.

process_strategy: One sentence explaining how the frames are derived from the same drawing and why the final will not outpace the process.

final_elements.name: major visible element
final_elements.description: What this element looks like in the finished sketch.

frames.visible_job: The concrete drawing job this frame performs.

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens, shades, colors, or clarifies elements that were already introduced.

rejection_checks: No major contour, prop, marking, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
